question: What text is written inside the red rectangular logo visible in the top right corner during the video? A. FITMENCOOK.com B. BIENVENIDOS C. QUICKIE D. TODAY'S RECIPE

What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A man wearing a red backward baseball cap and navy blue henley shirt stands in a kitchen, gesturing with his hands while speaking to the camera. A black meal prep container holding glazed salmon and a lemon wedge sits on the counter nearby, while text overlays identify the recipe as "Tamarind Salmon & Citrus Quinoa" with a "QUICKIE" logo in the corner. White cabinets and a black and white mosaic tile backsplash are visible behind him.

canonical_answer: At 0s, glazed meat ribs rest on a silver wire rack; at 2s, hands hold a black container with meat and lemon; at 4s, a man in a red cap raises his finger; at 8s, white recipe title text overlays the scene.

canonical_answer: The salmon is baked in an oven at 420 degrees for 8 minutes on a wire rack.
